hero.css: .hero_001 { --garden-ink:#2e2430; --garden-plum:#533247; --garden-rose:#b96878; --garden-blush:#f8ddd9; --garden-cream:#fff8ee; --garden-gold:#c89d53; --garden-leaf:#637a58; --garden-sage:#d7dfc4; position:relative; min-height:100svh; overflow:hidden; display:grid; place-items:center; padding:clamp(28px,4vw,58px); color:var(--garden-ink); background:radial-gradient(circle at 14% 18%, rgba(255,226,215,.95) 0 18%, transparent 42%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 14%, rgba(215,223,196,.82) 0 15%, transparent 39%), linear-gradient(135deg,#fffaf1 0%,#f9e8e5 44%,#eef3df 100%); font-family:Manrope, sans-serif; isolation:isolate;} .hero_001 .hero_001__garden-glow { position:absolute; inset:-18%; z-index:-3; background:conic-gradient(from 110deg at 50% 50%, rgba(200,157,83,.18), rgba(185,104,120,.2), rgba(99,122,88,.18), rgba(255,248,238,.5), rgba(200,157,83,.18)); filter:blur(34px); opacity:.8; animation:hero_001_drift 18s ease-in-out infinite alternate;} .hero_001 .hero_001__mesh { position:absolute; inset:0; z-index:-2; background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(83,50,71,.055) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(83,50,71,.045) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size:58px 58px; mask-image:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, black 0 58%, transparent 86%); opacity:.75;} .hero_001 .hero_001__floral-corner { position:absolute; width:42vmin; height:42vmin; border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none; opacity:.95;} .hero_001 .hero_001__floral-corner--left { left:-9vmin; bottom:-10vmin; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 32% 34%, rgba(185,104,120,.45) 0 8%, transparent 9%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 55% 36%, rgba(248,221,217,.95) 0 10%, transparent 11%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 42% 62%, rgba(200,157,83,.34) 0 7%, transparent 8%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 68% 65%, rgba(99,122,88,.42) 0 10%, transparent 11%);} .hero_001 .hero_001__floral-corner--right { right:-11vmin; top:-10vmin; transform:rotate(175deg); background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 36% 34%, rgba(248,221,217,.95) 0 11%, transparent 12%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 62% 38%, rgba(185,104,120,.42) 0 8%, transparent 9%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 48% 66%, rgba(99,122,88,.38) 0 11%, transparent 12%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 72% 70%, rgba(200,157,83,.28) 0 7%, transparent 8%);} .hero_001 .hero_001__petal { position:absolute; width:15px; height:26px; border-radius:80% 20% 80% 20%; background:linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,255,255,.75), rgba(185,104,120,.38)); box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(83,50,71,.14); opacity:.62; animation:hero_001_float 9s ease-in-out infinite;} .hero_001 .hero_001__petal--one { left:11%; top:24%; transform:rotate(28deg); animation-delay:-1s;} .hero_001 .hero_001__petal--two { right:13%; top:44%; transform:rotate(-38deg); animation-delay:-4s;} .hero_001 .hero_001__petal--three { left:51%; bottom:11%; transform:rotate(62deg); animation-delay:-6s;} .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width:min(1180px,100%); min-height:calc(100svh - clamp(56px,8vw,116px)); display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.05fr) minmax(320px,.95fr); align-items:center; gap:clamp(28px,5vw,72px); position:relative;} .hero_001 .hero_001__content { position:relative; z-index:2; padding:clamp(18px,2vw,30px) 0;} .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; margin:0 0 24px; color:var(--garden-plum); font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.28em; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:800;} .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::before { content:""; width:46px; height:1px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--garden-gold));} .hero_001 .hero_001__gujarati { margin:0 0 8px; font-family:'Noto Serif Gujarati', serif; font-size:clamp(24px,3.1vw,44px); line-height:1.1; color:var(--garden-rose); font-weight:700; text-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(185,104,120,.14);} .hero_001 .hero_001__title { margin:0; font-family:'Cormorant Garamond','Playfair Display',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:clamp(72px,10vw,148px); line-height:.78; letter-spacing:-.065em; color:var(--garden-ink); max-width:790px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__title span { display:block; padding-left:clamp(42px,8vw,120px); color:transparent; -webkit-text-stroke:1.2px var(--garden-plum); text-shadow:none;} .hero_001 .hero_001__message { width:min(640px,100%); margin:clamp(24px,3vw,38px) 0 0; padding-left:22px; border-left:1px solid rgba(200,157,83,.75); color:rgba(46,36,48,.82); font-size:clamp(15px,1.25vw,18px); line-height:1.85;} .hero_001 .hero_001__cta-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:14px; align-items:center; margin-top:clamp(26px,3vw,42px);} .hero_001 .hero_001__date-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; min-height:48px; padding:13px 20px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(255,248,238,.68); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.8); box-shadow:0 18px 52px rgba(83,50,71,.12); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); font-weight:800; color:var(--garden-plum);} .hero_001 .hero_001__date-pill::before { content:""; width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--garden-gold); box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(200,157,83,.16);} .hero_001 .hero_001__venue-line { font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(83,50,71,.72); font-weight:800;} .hero_001 .hero_001__art { position:relative; min-height:650px; display:grid; place-items:center;} .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { position:relative; width:min(455px,100%); aspect-ratio: .72 / 1; border-radius:230px 230px 34px 34px; background:linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,255,255,.56), rgba(255,248,238,.28)); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.78); box-shadow:0 44px 100px rgba(83,50,71,.2), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.9); backdrop-filter:blur(22px); overflow:hidden;} .hero_001 .hero_001__arch::before { content:""; position:absolute; inset:18px; border-radius:210px 210px 24px 24px; border:1px solid rgba(200,157,83,.42); background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 24%, rgba(255,255,255,.8), transparent 25%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(248,221,217,.56), rgba(238,243,223,.5));} .hero_001 .hero_001__arch::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:9% 11% 11%; border-radius:190px 190px 18px 18px; background-image:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(200,157,83,.18) 0 2px, transparent 2.5px), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, transparent 0 38%, rgba(185,104,120,.16) 39% 40%, transparent 41%), repeating-conic-gradient(from 8deg, rgba(99,122,88,.15) 0 7deg, transparent 7deg 18deg); background-size:24px 24px, 100% 100%, 100% 100%; mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, black 0 62%, transparent 72%); opacity:.86;} .hero_001 .hero_001__monogram { position:absolute; inset:auto 38px 44px; z-index:2; padding:24px 22px; border-radius:28px; background:rgba(255,250,241,.68); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.82); box-shadow:0 26px 70px rgba(83,50,71,.16); backdrop-filter:blur(18px); text-align:center;} .hero_001 .hero_001__initials { display:block; font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:clamp(42px,5vw,72px); line-height:.9; color:var(--garden-plum); letter-spacing:-.08em;} .hero_001 .hero_001__monogram small { display:block; margin-top:12px; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.24em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(83,50,71,.68); font-weight:800;} .hero_001 .hero_001__bloom { position:absolute; z-index:3; width:118px; height:118px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, #f7c8c9 0 12%, transparent 13%), conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(185,104,120,.88), rgba(255,230,220,.9), rgba(200,157,83,.55), rgba(185,104,120,.88)); box-shadow:0 26px 60px rgba(185,104,120,.24); mask-image:radial-gradient(circle, black 0 58%, transparent 60%); animation:hero_001_sway 7s ease-in-out infinite alternate;} .hero_001 .hero_001__bloom--one { top:12%; left:2%; transform:rotate(-18deg);} .hero_001 .hero_001__bloom--two { right:1%; bottom:17%; width:94px; height:94px; animation-delay:-2s;} .hero_001 .hero_001__leaf { position:absolute; z-index:2; width:190px; height:64px; border-radius:100% 0 100% 0; background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,122,88,.72), rgba(215,223,196,.45)); transform-origin:left center; box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(99,122,88,.16);} .hero_001 .hero_001__leaf--one { right:8%; top:18%; transform:rotate(-28deg);} .hero_001 .hero_001__leaf--two { left:3%; bottom:22%; transform:rotate(154deg) scale(.9);} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card { position:absolute; z-index:4; left:-20px; bottom:70px; width:min(280px,72%); padding:22px 22px 20px; border-radius:26px; background:rgba(83,50,71,.82); color:var(--garden-cream); box-shadow:0 28px 76px rgba(46,36,48,.24); backdrop-filter:blur(18px);} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card strong { display:block; font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:32px; font-weight:700; line-height:1; letter-spacing:-.03em;} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card span { display:block; margin-top:10px; font-size:13px; line-height:1.6; color:rgba(255,248,238,.78);} .hero_001 .hero_001__floating-note { position:absolute; z-index:4; right:-16px; top:92px; padding:15px 18px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(255,250,241,.74); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.82); box-shadow:0 22px 64px rgba(83,50,71,.14); color:var(--garden-plum); font-family:'Noto Serif Gujarati',serif; font-weight:700;} @keyframes hero_001_float { 0%,100% { margin-top:0; opacity:.45;} 50% { margin-top:-28px; opacity:.82;} } @keyframes hero_001_drift { from { transform:rotate(0deg) scale(1);} to { transform:rotate(9deg) scale(1.05);} } @keyframes hero_001_sway { from { translate:0 0; rotate:-2deg;} to { translate:0 -14px; rotate:5deg;} } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 { padding:28px 22px 42px; align-items:start;} .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:20px; min-height:auto;} .hero_001 .hero_001__content { text-align:center; padding-top:28px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { justify-content:center; margin-bottom:18px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow::before { width:34px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__title { margin-inline:auto; font-size:clamp(68px,16vw,118px);} .hero_001 .hero_001__title span { padding-left:0;} .hero_001 .hero_001__message { margin-inline:auto; padding-left:0; border-left:0; padding-top:18px; border-top:1px solid rgba(200,157,83,.55);} .hero_001 .hero_001__cta-row { justify-content:center;} .hero_001 .hero_001__art { min-height:560px; order:2;} .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { width:min(410px,88vw);} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card { left:4%; bottom:42px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__floating-note { right:4%; top:68px;} } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 { min-height:100svh; padding:22px 16px 34px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__mesh { background-size:38px 38px; opacity:.45;} .hero_001 .hero_001__content { padding-top:12px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.22em; gap:10px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__gujarati { font-size:24px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__title { font-size:64px; line-height:.84; letter-spacing:-.055em;} .hero_001 .hero_001__message { font-size:14px; line-height:1.72; margin-top:20px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__cta-row { gap:10px; margin-top:24px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__date-pill { width:100%; justify-content:center; padding:12px 16px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__venue-line { width:100%; text-align:center; font-size:11px; line-height:1.5;} .hero_001 .hero_001__art { min-height:420px; margin-top:4px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { width:min(318px,88vw); border-radius:180px 180px 28px 28px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__monogram { inset:auto 24px 28px; padding:18px 16px; border-radius:22px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__initials { font-size:46px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__bloom--one { width:82px; height:82px; top:9%; left:0;} .hero_001 .hero_001__bloom--two { width:68px; height:68px; right:0; bottom:20%;} .hero_001 .hero_001__leaf { width:118px; height:42px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card { width:210px; left:0; bottom:18px; padding:16px; border-radius:20px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card strong { font-size:25px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__info-card span { font-size:12px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__floating-note { top:40px; right:0; padding:11px 13px; font-size:13px;} .hero_001 .hero_001__petal { display:none;} }
hero.designNotes: A romantic floral-garden hero with luxury editorial typography, soft Gujarati-English details, glassmorphism, custom CSS blooms, and an asymmetrical ceremonial arch motif. The design avoids overt iconography while honoring the Gujarati celebration through language, color, and event wording.
hero.html:
Wedding Celebration

કાવ્યા અને મિહિર

Kavya & Mihir

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

March 22, 2026
Akshar Grand Palace · Somerset, New Jersey
K · MLove in full bloom
પ્રેમ અને ઉજવણી
SomersetAn evening garden mood for family, music, dinner, and unforgettable celebration.
